note: Devel is a developer toolkit (dump helpers, introspection pages, dumper plugins, Drush commands). All cases are `recipe` (response-graded), not `execution` — the eval must not enable Devel or mutate the site.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site with the Devel module enabled, I want to quickly print a PHP variable to the screen as a Drupal message while debugging in code. Which Devel global helper function do I call? Name it.
evals.expected_output: Call dpm($value) (dump to the page as a Drupal message); dsm()/dvm() are related message-output variants.

evals.prompt: In Drupal code I can't print debug output to the page (it's a redirect/AJAX path). Using Devel, how do I write a variable dump to a log file instead? Name the helper function and where its output goes.
evals.expected_output: Use dd($data) to write to the Devel debug log file (config key debug_logfile, default temporary://drupal_debug.txt).

evals.prompt: What is the default variable-dumper backend Devel uses to render dumps, and what Devel helper prints a dump using the Kint backend when it's installed? Name both.
evals.expected_output: The default dumper is Symfony VarDumper (plugin id var_dumper); kint($input) renders via the Kint dumper when its library is present.

evals.prompt: From the command line on a Drupal 11 site with Devel + Drush, which drush commands list the service-container service IDs and the available tokens? Give the command names.
evals.expected_output: drush devel:services (list service IDs/classes) and drush devel:token (list available tokens). Devel also ships devel:hook, devel:event, devel:uuid, devel:reinstall.

evals.prompt: I need to bulk-generate dummy nodes, users, and taxonomy terms on a Drupal 11 dev site. Which Devel submodule provides this, and what is the Drush command namespace it adds?
evals.expected_output: The Devel Generate submodule (devel_generate) creates bulk dummy content and adds the devel-generate:* content-generation Drush commands.

evals.prompt: Which Devel permission must an account have to view developer output such as variable dumps, the query log, and the routes/services/events introspection pages? Name the exact permission machine string.
evals.expected_output: The `access devel information` permission (restrict access: TRUE — grant only to trusted developers).

evals.prompt: I want to register a custom variable-dumper backend for Devel from my own module. Which Devel plugin type do I implement, and in which plugin discovery directory does the class go?
evals.expected_output: Implement the DevelDumper plugin type (base class DevelDumperBase), placing the class in src/Plugin/Devel/Dumper/; the active backend is chosen by devel.settings:devel_dumper.
